RuleSet.Name: src/schemapubobj/ISchemaPubTableObj.java

GenFile.Name: reallyFileISchemaPubTableObjJava
GenFile.BasePackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$pub/src/main/java
GenFile.SubPackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$pubobj

RuleSet.GenRule: boolean $leadlower Name$($iterate Params( first declPubServerMethodParamNoComma each declPubServerMethodParam empty empty )$ );
boolean $leadlower Name$( I$DefSchemaName$Pub$TableName$Obj obj$iterate Params( each declPubServerMethodParam empty empty )$ );
I$reference RetTable DefSchemaName$Pub$reference RetTable Name$Obj $leadlower Name$($iterate Params( first declPubServerMethodParamNoComma each declPubServerMethodParam empty empty )$ );
I$reference RetTable DefSchemaName$Pub$reference RetTable Name$Obj $leadlower Name$( I$DefSchemaName$Pub$TableName$Obj obj$iterate Params( each declPubServerMethodParam empty empty )$ );
List<I$reference RetTable DefSchemaName$Pub$reference RetTable Name$Obj> $leadlower Name$($iterate Params( first declPubServerMethodParamNoComma each declPubServerMethodParam empty empty )$ );
List<I$reference RetTable DefSchemaName$Pub$reference RetTable Name$Obj> $leadlower Name$( I$DefSchemaName$Pub$TableName$Obj obj$iterate Params( each declPubServerMethodParam empty empty )$ );

$reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex declPubTableObjReadByThisPrimaryIndex$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes declPubTableObjReadByInhIndexes default empty$$iterate Index( each declPubTableObjReadByThisNonPrimaryIndex )$
$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes declPubTableObjReadByInhIndexes default empty$$iterate Index( each declPubTableObjReadByInhNonPrimaryIndex )$

/** * Get the $DefSchemaName$Pub$TableName$Obj instance for the unique $Suffix$ key.$iterate Columns( each implPubCommentKeyAttr empty empty )$ * * @return $DefSchemaName$Pub$TableName$Obj cached instance for the unique $Suffix$ key, or * null if no such instance exists. */ I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Pub$poptop Table TableName$Obj read$poptop Table TableName$By$Suffix$($iterate Columns( first declPubColumnArg each declPubCommaColumnArg )$ );
/** * Get the $DefSchemaName$Pub$TableName$Obj instance for the unique $Suffix$ key.$iterate Columns( each implPubCommentKeyAttr empty empty )$ * * @return $DefSchemaName$Pub$TableName$Obj refreshed instance for the unique $Suffix$ key, or * null if no such instance exists. */ I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Pub$poptop Table TableName$Obj read$poptop Table TableName$By$Suffix$($iterate Columns( first declPubColumnArg each declPubCommaColumnArg )$, boolean forceRead );

/** * Get the $DefSchemaName$Pub$TableName$Obj instance for the primary key attributes.$reference Table reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each implPubCommentKeyAttr empty empty )$ * * @return $DefSchemaName$Pub$TableName$Obj cached instance for the primary key, or * null if no such instance exists. */ I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Pub$poptop Table TableName$Obj read$poptop Table TableName$By$reference Table reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex Suffix$( $iterate Columns( first declPubColumnArg each declPubCommaColumnArg )$ );
/** * Get the $DefSchemaName$Pub$TableName$Obj instance for the primary key attributes.$reference Table reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each implPubCommentKeyAttr empty empty )$ * * @return $DefSchemaName$Pub$TableName$Obj refreshed instance for the primary key, or * null if no such instance exists. */ I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Pub$poptop Table TableName$Obj read$poptop Table TableName$By$reference Table reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex Suffix$( $iterate Columns( first declPubColumnArg each declPubCommaColumnArg )$, boolean forceRead );

/** * Get the $DefSchemaName$Pub$TableName$Obj instance for the unique $Suffix$ key.$iterate Columns( each implPubCommentKeyAttr empty empty )$ * * @return $DefSchemaName$Pub$TableName$Obj cached instance for the unique $Suffix$ key, or * null if no such instance exists. */ I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Pub$poptop Table TableName$Obj read$poptop Table TableName$By$Suffix$( $iterate Columns( first declPubColumnArg each declPubCommaColumnArg )$ );
/** * Get the $DefSchemaName$Pub$TableName$Obj instance for the unique $Suffix$ key.$iterate Columns( each implPubCommentKeyAttr empty empty )$ * * @return $DefSchemaName$Pub$TableName$Obj refreshed instance for the unique $Suffix$ key, or * null if no such instance exists. */ I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Pub$poptop Table TableName$Obj read$poptop Table TableName$By$Suffix$( $iterate Columns( first declPubColumnArg each declPubCommaColumnArg )$, boolean forceRead );

/** * Get the map of $DefSchemaName$Pub$TableName$Obj instances sorted by their primary keys for the duplicate $Suffix$ key.$iterate Columns( each implPubCommentKeyAttr empty empty )$ * * @return List of $DefSchemaName$Pub$TableName$Obj cached instances sorted by their primary keys for the duplicate $Suffix$ key, * which may be an empty set. */ List<I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Pub$poptop Table TableName$Obj> read$poptop Table TableName$By$Suffix$( $iterate Columns( first declPubColumnArg each declPubCommaColumnArg )$ );
/** * Get the map of $DefSchemaName$Pub$TableName$Obj instances sorted by their primary keys for the duplicate $Suffix$ key.$iterate Columns( each implPubCommentKeyAttr empty empty )$ * * @return List of $DefSchemaName$Pub$TableName$Obj cached instances sorted by their primary keys for the duplicate $Suffix$ key, * which may be an empty set. */ List<I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Pub$poptop Table TableName$Obj> read$poptop Table TableName$By$Suffix$( $iterate Columns( first declPubColumnArg each declPubCommaColumnArg )$, boolean forceRead );

/** * Get the map of $DefSchemaName$Pub$TableName$Obj instances sorted by their primary keys for the duplicate $Suffix$ key.$iterate Columns( each implPubCommentKeyAttr empty empty )$ * * @return List of $poptop Table DefSchemaName$Pub$poptop Table TableName$Obj cached instances sorted by their primary keys for the duplicate $Suffix$ key, * which may be an empty set. */ List<I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Pub$poptop Table TableName$Obj> read$poptop Table TableName$By$Suffix$( $iterate Columns( first declPubColumnArg each declPubCommaColumnArg )$ );
/** * Get the map of $poptop Table DefSchemaName$Pub$poptop Table TableName$Obj instances sorted by their primary keys for the duplicate $Suffix$ key.$iterate Columns( each implPubCommentKeyAttr empty empty )$ * * @return List of $poptop Table DefSchemaName$Pub$poptop Table TableName$Obj cached instances sorted by their primary keys for the duplicate $Suffix$ key, * which may be an empty set. */ List<I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Pub$poptop Table TableName$Obj> read$poptop Table TableName$By$Suffix$( $iterate Columns( first declPubColumnArg each declPubCommaColumnArg )$, boolean forceRead );

/** * Construct an appropriate subclass instance based on the specified class code. * * @param backingClassCode The backing store class code used to identify the proposed instance class. * * @return I$SchemaName$Pub$TableName$Obj instance, which may be a subclass of a $TableName$ instance. */ I$DefSchemaName$Pub$TableName$Obj constructByClassCode( int backingClassCode );

/** * Return a sorted list of all the $TableName$-derived instances in the database. * * @return List of I$DefSchemaName$Pub$TableName$Obj instance, sorted by their primary keys, which * may include an empty set. */ List<I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Pub$poptop Table TableName$Obj> readAll$poptop Table TableName$();
/** * Return a sorted map of all the $TableName$-derived instances in the database. * * @return List of I$DefSchemaName$Pub$TableName$Obj instance, sorted by their primary keys, which * may include an empty set. */ List<I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Pub$poptop Table TableName$Obj> readAll$poptop Table TableName$( boolean forceRead );

/** * Return a sorted map of a page of the $TableName$-derived instances in the database. * * @return List of I$DefSchemaName$Pub$TableName$Obj instance, sorted by their primary keys, which * may include an empty set. */ List<I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Pub$poptop Table TableName$Obj> pageAll$poptop Table TableName$($reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( first declPubOptPriorArg each declPubCommaOptPriorArg )$ );

/** * Read a $TableName$-derived instance by it's primary key. * * @param pkey The primary key identifying the instance to read. * * @return The $TableName$-derived instance identified by the primary key, * or null if no such key value exists. */ I$DefSchemaName$Pub$TableName$Obj read$TableName$( $IPubCompactedPrimaryIndexClass$ pkey );
/** * Read a $TableName$-derived instance by it's primary key. * * @param pkey The primary key identifying the instance to read. * * @return The $TableName$-derived instance identified by the primary key, * or null if no such key value exists. */ I$DefSchemaName$Pub$TableName$Obj read$TableName$( $IPubCompactedPrimaryIndexClass$ pkey, boolean forceRead );

/** * Read a $TableName$-derived instance by it's primary key. * * @return The $TableName$-derived instance identified by the primary key, * or null if no such key value exists. */ I$DefSchemaName$Pub$TableName$Obj read$TableName$( $reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( first declPubColumnArg each declPubCommaColumnArg )$ );
/** * Read a $TableName$-derived instance by it's primary key. * * @return The $TableName$-derived instance identified by the primary key, * or null if no such key value exists. */ I$DefSchemaName$Pub$TableName$Obj read$TableName$( $reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( first declPubColumnArg each declPubCommaColumnArg )$, boolean forceRead );

/** * Read a List of $TableName$-derived instances sorted by their primary keys, * as identified by the duplicate $Suffix$ key attributes.$iterate Columns( each implPubCommentKeyAttr empty empty )$ * * @return A List of $TableName$-derived instances sorted by their primary keys, * as identified by the key attributes, which may be an empty set. */ List<I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Pub$poptop Table TableName$Obj> read$TableName$By$Suffix$( $iterate Columns( first declPubColumnArg each declPubCommaColumnArg )$ );
/** * Read a List of $TableName$-derived instances sorted by their primary keys, * as identified by the duplicate $Suffix$ key attributes.$iterate Columns( each implPubCommentKeyAttr empty empty )$ * * @return A List of $TableName$-derived instances sorted by their primary keys, * as identified by the key attributes, which may be an empty set. */ List<I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Pub$poptop Table TableName$Obj> read$TableName$By$Suffix$( $iterate Columns( first declPubColumnArg each declPubCommaColumnArg )$, boolean forceRead );
$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes declPubTableObjPageByInhIndex default empty$$iterate Index( each declPubTableObjPageByThisNonPrimaryIndex )$

/** * Read a page of data as a List of $TableName$-derived instances sorted by their primary keys, * as identified by the duplicate $Suffix$ key attributes.$iterate Columns( each implPubCommentKeyAttr empty empty )$ * * @return A List of $TableName$-derived instances sorted by their primary keys, * as identified by the key attributes, which may be an empty set. */ List<I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$Pub$poptop Table TableName$Obj> page$TableName$By$Suffix$( $iterate Columns( first declPubColumnArg each declPubCommaColumnArg )$$poptop Table reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each declPubCommaOptPriorArg )$ );

$reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex declPubTableObjDeleteByThisPrimaryIndex$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes declPubTableObjDeleteByInhIndexes default empty$$iterate Index( each declPubTableObjDeleteByThisNonPrimaryIndex )$
$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes declPubTableObjDeleteByInhIndexes default empty$$iterate Index( each declPubTableObjDeleteByInhNonPrimaryIndex )$
$declPubTableObjReadCachedByPrimaryIndex$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes declPubTableObjReadCachedByInhIndexes default empty$$iterate Index( each declPubTableObjReadCachedByThisNonPrimaryIndex )$
$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes declPubTableObjReadCachedByInhIndexes default empty$$iterate Index( each declPubTableObjReadCachedByInhNonPrimaryIndex )$
I$DefSchemaName$Pub$poptop Table TableName$Obj readCached$poptop Table TableName$By$Suffix$( $iterate Columns( first declPubColumnArg each declPubCommaColumnArg )$ );
List<I$DefSchemaName$Pub$poptop Table TableName$Obj> readCached$poptop Table TableName$By$Suffix$( $iterate Columns( first declPubColumnArg each declPubCommaColumnArg )$ );
List<I$DefSchemaName$Pub$poptop Table TableName$Obj> readCached$poptop Table TableName$By$Suffix$( $iterate Columns( first declPubColumnArg each declPubCommaColumnArg )$ );

$declPubTableObjDeepDisposeByPrimaryIndex$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes declPubTableObjDeepDisposeByInhIndexes default empty$$iterate Index( each declPubTableObjDeepDisposeByThisNonPrimaryIndex )$
$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes declPubTableObjDeepDisposeByInhIndexes default empty$$iterate Index( each declPubTableObjDeepDisposeByInhNonPrimaryIndex )$
void deepDispose$poptop Table TableName$By$Suffix$( $iterate Columns( first declPubColumnArg each declPubCommaColumnArg )$ );
void deepDispose$poptop Table TableName$By$Suffix$( $iterate Columns( first declPubColumnArg each declPubCommaColumnArg )$ );
public void deepDispose$poptop Table TableName$By$Suffix$( $iterate Columns( first declPubColumnArg each declPubCommaColumnArg )$ );
